reviews.review_description: Full of graphical anomalies, missing texures, objects floating in midair, people popping in and out, a odd distortion around the guy in the boat with you, ect.  Might be a decent story but for me unwatchable

reviews.review_title: Had to do a trick to get it to load
reviews.review_description:
Overall cool experience.  As others have mentioned, after the menu where you select your options and press "Play", you just get a black screen.   

But I found I could easily fix this by going into the Meta Settings->Storage section, I could then select the Icon next to the game to clear its data/cache.  Once I did that, the experience worked fine.

It’s very well made! I see why it won awards! The download process is annoying. I just watched the directors cut in app while it went. I still had 20% left after but I just moved my oculus up slightly and played on my phone. It’s worth the hassle.

developer_response.body: Hello johnathanrolin! Thank you for your review and for sharing your thoughts on our experience. We are working on fixing the download process, but thanks again for your patience and for your comments about the story.

reviews.review_description: I had put a piece of tape over the Quest sensor to not interrupt the download, because it was taking awhile. I got 1% in 15 minutes. I wanna love this, come on!

developer_response.body: Hi Mykall81. We appreciate your honesty and your willingness to share your thoughts on the experience. We are working on solving this download issue with the developers as soon as possible, thanks for your trust and patience on this.

reviews.review_description:
The content  which is the actual movie should be download with in the app.
It's try to download it for 1.5 hours (covering the proximity sensor and keep moving the headset.

I'm very sorry that still didn't help.
The movie didn't pass 28% before it failed.

I would love the developer contact me so we cloud fix this.


Update suggestion :

For now, can you give me a link to download the content directly and I'll put it manually inside the relevant folder in the quest?

developer_response.body:
Hi!

Thank you for your feedback. We apologize for the inconvenience you may have experienced due to the issues within our application. Your reviews were instrumental in highlighting areas for improvement, and we're happy to announce that these issues have now been resolved.

We've made a significant update to the application to enhance its functionality and user experience. We kindly invite you to try the updated version. We value your opinion and would appreciate it if you could give the app another try and share your thoughts.

Thank you for your understanding and patience.

reviews.review_description: Tried to download and start app several times, after a long download you can press play, but screen stays black.

Hi tkohlhaase,

Thank you for your feedback. We apologize for the inconvenience you may have experienced due to the issues within our application. Your reviews were instrumental in highlighting areas for improvement, and we're happy to announce that these issues have now been resolved.

We've made a significant update to the application to enhance its functionality and user experience. We kindly invite you to try the updated version. We value your opinion and would appreciate it if you could give the app another try and share your thoughts.

Thank you for your understanding and patience.

reviews.review_title: 5 stars if you’re ok with 2D 360 videos
reviews.review_description:
Update:

The developers quickly addressed the technical issues and I’ve repurchased the game. It installs easily now and runs well.

Unfortunately the movie is not in stereoscopic 3D, it’s a flat, 360 degree video.  Non-stereoscopic content in VR is one of the few things that still make me queasy despite years of near daily VR use. I’m fine with smooth locomotion, air combat, racing, etc. The only thing besides non-stereoscopic environments that can made me sick are frequent frame rate lags in certain game genres like racing.

The video seems very compelling so far.  The artistic presentation is interesting. Unfortunately it’s very difficult to watch for more than a couple of minutes without feeling ill.

But I’m going to keep it and use it to see if I can build up a tolerance for non-stereoscopic videos by watching it for a few minutes a day.

If you don’t have a problem with flat 360 degree videos and the subject matter interests you, this is definitely worth a purchase.

Five stars if you’re fine with flat 360 videos.

Original Review:

This is one of those experiences that install in two parts. After you install the player and load that up it takes you to a waiting area where you have to download the rest.

If you take the headset off it breaks the download and you have to start all over again. It’s a very large download and hanging out in the menu gets pretty dull fast.

Since the secondary download is mandatory they should have the entire thing download at once.

I may just set the Quest on a table and put something in front of the proximity sensor and hope that the brief interruption doesn’t break the download, but I’m leaning towards getting a refund because such a sloppy technical design right from the start doesn’t bode well for the actual experience.

Update:

Since there has been no response from the developers I’ll be requesting a refund.

developer_response.body: Hey Jioxx, we greatly appreciate your willingness to revisit our experience, and we sincerely hope it resonates positively with you this time. Your feedback regarding 360 videos is fully understood and valued. To provide a little backstory, this project was initially designed in 6DOF for PCVR. However, in an effort to make it accessible to Quest users, we developed an app featuring 360 videos. Our hope is that with time, viewers will grow accustomed to these 360 videos and be able to enjoy "End of Night" without any discomfort.

reviews.review_title: Unique way to tell a Story
reviews.review_description: This is a very unique Story that was put together in a wonderful way. There is a second download you need to get after you install it, but it is worth it. I really enjoy how this was put together to tell this story. Thank you

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for reviewing End of Night. We are glad you like it!

reviews.review_description: I'm glad the installation issues are resolved. Thanks to the developers. I knew the journey would be important, a strong story 👏

developer_response.body: Hi Niste! Thank you for your review and for your comments about the story.
